message:
fix(convergence): relocate spectral health emission from threshold accessor to partition state update

Move emit_spectral_health() call from effective_thresholds() — a pure
threshold-calculation method — to update_partition_state() where stateful
side effects belong. This ensures the spectral health snapshot fires
exactly once per fleet evaluation cycle in the correct phase of
convergence processing, rather than potentially multiple times per cycle
whenever thresholds are queried.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
